scope: AG4 fleet daily rollup consumer for doctor-mode scorecard regression evidence
producer: per-repo daily-report result fields doctor_mode_scorecard, doctor_mode.scorecard, doctor.scorecard, or latest .flywheel/audit/*doctor-mode-scorecard*.json
consumer: fleet_summary.doctor_mode_scorecard plus red_flags[] code doctor_mode_scorecard_regressed_above_50 when week_over_week_delta < -50
promotion: warn-equivalent fleet red flag in the daily rollup; regression threshold matches flywheel-oxzyr AG4
parent_disposition: flywheel-oxzyr remains open for the broader per-binary doctor-mode wave; this child closes the explicit AG4 rollup wiring gap.
